metadata.title: CGE-P Labs Compliance Component Definitions
metadata.remarks: Complete control implementations across AWS infrastructure - Labs 2.3, 2.5, 3.3, 3.4, 5.2, 5.4, 4.3, 4.4

components.title: Lab 2.3: Compliant S3 Buckets
components.description: AWS S3 buckets with encryption at rest, access logging, versioning, and public access blocks

implemented-requirements.description: S3 buckets configured with AES-256 server-side encryption

statements.description: Data bucket encryption enabled via aws_s3_bucket_server_side_encryption_configuration with AES256 algorithm

by-components.description: S3 bucket enforces encryption at rest

implemented-requirements.description: S3 bucket access logging configured to capture all access events

statements.description: S3 access logs written to secondary bucket with prefix evidence-access-logs/

by-components.description: S3 logging captures who accessed what, when

implemented-requirements.description: S3 versioning enabled to maintain configuration history

statements.description: aws_s3_bucket_versioning resource enables version history for all objects

implemented-requirements.description: Public access blocks prevent unauthorized S3 access

statements.description: aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block blocks all public ACLs, policies, and restricts bucket access

components.title: Lab 2.5: IaC Evidence Pipeline
components.description: Automated evidence collection from infrastructure with DynamoDB metadata, KMS encryption, Lambda processors

implemented-requirements.description: Evidence data encrypted at rest using KMS and S3 encryption

statements.description: DynamoDB table with KMS encryption, S3 evidence archive with KMS keys, automatic key rotation enabled

by-components.description: All evidence encrypted with KMS (key ID 5ee4a427-f69b-42a4-9d4d-a0ef26c38b1c)

implemented-requirements.description: Evidence integrity verified through DynamoDB PITR, versioning, and Lambda hash verification

statements.description: Point-in-time recovery enabled on DynamoDB, S3 versioning on archive, Lambda verifier calculates SHA256 hashes

by-components.description: Evidence integrity protected through cryptographic verification

components.title: Lab 5.2: AWS Security Baseline
components.description: Multi-service security baseline across CloudTrail, GuardDuty, IAM, VPC Flow Logs, Config, Secrets Manager

implemented-requirements.description: CloudTrail logs all API calls to S3 archive with log file validation

statements.description: Multi-region CloudTrail enabled with log file validation and include_global_service_events

by-components.description: CloudTrail archive (cgep-cloudtrail-logs-lab52-baseline) contains complete API audit trail

implemented-requirements.description: GuardDuty enabled for ML-based threat detection with S3 logs and Kubernetes audit logs

statements.description: GuardDuty detector (88ac872719284680ab2b843482f55317) monitors account for suspicious activity

by-components.description: GuardDuty generates findings for intrusion attempts and data exfiltration

implemented-requirements.description: IAM least privilege policies restrict access to minimum required actions

statements.description: Custom IAM policy cgep-least-privilege-s3-read-lab52-baseline grants only S3 GetObject, ListBucket on specific buckets

by-components.description: IAM policy limits permissions to necessary actions only

components.title: Lab 4.3: GRC Evidence Pipeline
components.description: Governance, Risk & Compliance automation integrating evidence collection, validation, and compliance scoring

implemented-requirements.description: Daily GRC pipeline orchestration calculates and tracks compliance score

statements.description: EventBridge rule (cgep-grc-daily-pipeline-lab43-grc) triggers daily at 2:30 AM UTC to run GRC assessment

by-components.description: Lambda aggregator evaluates 8 NIST controls and updates DynamoDB status table

components.title: Lab 4.4: Chain of Custody
components.description: Evidence integrity and audit trail for regulatory compliance (SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001)

implemented-requirements.description: Evidence access logged to CloudWatch with 10-year retention for audit

statements.description: Log group /aws/chain-of-custody/evidence-lab44-coc captures all evidence access events

by-components.description: Immutable audit trail records who accessed what evidence, when

implemented-requirements.description: Evidence retention policy enforces 7-year minimum legal hold with automatic expiration

statements.description: DynamoDB TTL with ExpirationTime attribute, S3 lifecycle policies archive to Glacier

by-components.description: Evidence automatically archived after 7 years per retention policy
